requirements.task_name: Submit a website redesign quote request for 12 pages with an $8,000 budget
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the web design services, open the custom quote form, and submit a quote request specifying a website redesign with 12 pages, an exact budget of $8,000, and a timeline of within 3 months, including contact information.

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheapest monthly maintenance plan with at least 10 support hours and start onboarding
requirements.task_description: Find the maintenance/care plans, filter to monthly billing, identify the plan that offers at least 10 support hours per month at the lowest monthly price, and start the onboarding request with company details and preferred start date.

requirements.task_name: Save an ecommerce case study with at least 20% conversion uplift to the shortlist
requirements.task_description: Go to the case studies, filter for ecommerce projects, sort by conversion uplift, open the first project showing a conversion rate increase of at least 20%, add it to the shortlist, and open it again from the shortlist page.

required_variables.set_condition: On any call where filters.industry === 'ecommerce' and sort_by === 'conversion_uplift_desc'.
required_variables.reason: Capture the exact filters and sort order used when viewing case studies so the evaluator can confirm that the user filtered to ecommerce and sorted by conversion uplift high-to-low, as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getShortlistItems is called (i.e., when the shortlist page is loaded).
required_variables.reason: Provide evidence that the user opened the shortlist page, corresponding to the step of clicking the Shortlist icon/link.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully finding a case_study for the given slug, if that case study’s id appears in shortlist_items for the user’s current shortlist.
required_variables.reason: Track that the user viewed a case study that is already in their shortlist, which is the closest non-invasive proxy for reopening the saved case study from the shortlist page.

requirements.task_name: Save a 2023 UX article about SaaS onboarding to the reading list and reopen it
requirements.task_description: Search the blog for SaaS onboarding content, filter the results to the year 2023, select the first article tagged with UX and a minimum 5-minute read time, save it to the reading list, open the reading list, and reopen the article from there.

required_variables.set_condition: On any call where the query string equals 'SaaS onboarding' ignoring case, filters.year === 2023, and sort_by === 'newest_first'.
required_variables.reason: Record the precise search parameters so the evaluator can confirm that the user searched for SaaS onboarding content, filtered to year 2023, and sorted by newest first as required.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getReadingListItems is called (i.e., when the reading list page is loaded).
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the user opened the reading list view, satisfying the step of navigating to the saved articles page.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully finding an article for the given slug, if that article’s id appears in reading_list_items for the user’s current reading list.
required_variables.reason: Track that the user viewed an article that is present in their reading list, providing a proxy for reopening the saved SaaS onboarding article from the reading list.

requirements.task_name: Create and save a mobile app + website project estimate that stays at or under $25,000
requirements.task_description: Use the project estimator to configure a project that includes both a mobile app and a marketing website, adjust feature tiers so the total estimated cost is $25,000 or less, set the target budget to $25,000, and save the estimate using the on-site save function (not email).

requirements.task_name: Book a 30-minute discovery call on a Wednesday morning using the on-site scheduler
requirements.task_description: Open the contact scheduler, select UTC time zone, choose any Wednesday in the current month, pick the earliest available 30-minute slot between 9:00 and 11:00 AM, and confirm the booking with basic contact details and topic selection.

requirements.task_name: Configure an hourly UX research engagement under $200/hour for up to 80 hours and send an inquiry
requirements.task_description: Open the UX Research & Testing service page, switch to hourly pricing, set the engagement to around 80 hours, select any option that yields an hourly rate under $200, and send an inquiry mentioning the 80-hour need and sub-$200/hour rate.

requirements.task_name: Select a branding package under $5,000 with at least 3 logo concepts and brand guidelines and start onboarding
requirements.task_description: View and compare branding packages, identify the cheapest package under $5,000 that includes at least 3 logo concepts and a brand guidelines document, configure it with one-time payment and no add-ons, and start the onboarding form with specific company details and launch date.
